category_sources: source_facts.description says Yaws is a webserver for dynamic content; official homepage describes it as an HTTP/1.1 webserver for dynamic-content web applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is yaws; official homepage title is 'Yaws'.
docs_sources: Official Yaws homepage states documentation and examples are on erlyaws.github.io; official configuration page documents build, install, running, and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/erlyaws/yaws; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify Yaws as an Erlang HTTP webserver for dynamic-content applications with standalone and embedded modes.
